purpose: Capture a fresh row32 full-wire no-comment/max1400 native pair to test whether the max1400 extent-like structure depends on empty-row carriers or persists under fully occupied horizontal wire rows

entries.label: grc32fw_no_comment_native_20260307
entries.description: row32 native full-wire no-comment control for max1400 carrier-dependence check

entries.label: grc32fw_max1400_native_20260307
entries.description: row32 native full-wire max1400 control using scratchpad/max1400_comment_body_20260307.txt

decision_target.carrier_dependent_hypothesis: the extra max1400 structure relies on empty logical rows as hidden carriers and will collapse or materially change under full-wire row occupation
decision_target.carrier_independent_hypothesis: the extra max1400 structure is comment-owned extent metadata and will still allocate or preserve the scaling signature under full-wire geometry
